# Mixed fixture — combines secrets, PII, paranoid patterns, and innocent text
# Tests that each level only redacts what it should.

# Secrets (redacted at all levels)
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=[REDACTED-ANTHROPIC-KEY]
GITHUB_TOKEN=[REDACTED-GITHUB-TOKEN]
[REDACTED-PASSWORD]

# PII (redacted at standard+, must pass through at minimal)
[REDACTED-PII-NAME]
ssn: [REDACTED-SSN]
phone: ([REDACTED-PHONE]
card_number: [REDACTED-CREDIT-CARD]
contact: [EMAIL-1]
server: [IP-INTERNAL-1]

# Paranoid-only (redacted only at paranoid)
iban: [REDACTED-IBAN]
AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=[REDACTED-AWS-SECRET]
Reading config from /home/[USER-1]/.config/myapp/[FILE].json

# Innocent context — must survive all levels
service = "billing"
version = "[HOST-1]"
log_level = "warn"
region = "eu-west-1"
